Package com.mohanad.edufinance.model

Class Transaction

java.lang.Object
com.mohanad.edufinance.model.Transaction
public class Transaction extends Object
Concrete class representing a Financial Transaction in the system. Keeps records of Student Payments and Teacher Payroll distributions.
Author:
MOHANAD

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • Transaction

      public Transaction()
      Default constructor.

    • Transaction

      public Transaction(int id, String type, double amount, String date, int personId)
      Parameterized constructor.
      Parameters:
      id - The transaction ID
      type - The transaction type ('STUDENT_PAYMENT' or 'TEACHER_PAYROLL')
      amount - The transaction money amount
      date - The date of the transaction
      personId - The associated student or teacher ID
